name: Anivia
title: The Cryopheonix
shortBio:
- Frostbite (E) doesn't have Chill passive
- Glacial Storm (R) slow also affects attack speed

skins.name: Festival Queen Anivia
skins.description: For one week a year, Anivia takes a break from being a prophetic ice spirit of the Freljord, and takes off for warmer climes… somewhere people will appreciate her samba.

skins.name: Divine Phoenix Anivia

skins.description: The legendary fenghuang watches over the world, awaiting the rise of selfless champions. Anivia grants power to those who fight for others with bravery and kindness in their hearts.

skins.description: Victorious Anivia was awarded to players who earned the requisite ranked split points in Season 2023 Split 1. Rising from the ashes covered in crystalline armor, Anivia's opulent feathers reflect her heightened nature. She is perseverance personified, an undying wish granted to those that need her most.

passive.name: Rebirth
passive.description: Upon dying, Anivia will revert into an egg. If the egg can survive for six seconds, she is gloriously reborn.

spells.name: Flash Frost
spells.description: Anivia brings her wings together and summons a sphere of ice that flies towards her opponents, chilling and damaging anyone in its path. When the sphere explodes it does moderate damage in a radius, stunning anyone in the area.
spells.dynamicDescription:
A massive chunk of ice flies toward target location, dealing @TotalPassthroughDamage@ magic damage and chilling targets, Slowing their Movement Speed by 20%.

At the end of its range or if Anivia recasts the spell, the missile detonates, doing @TotalExplosionDamage@ magic damage in a small area and Stunning units for @StunDuration@ second.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Crystallize
spells.description: Anivia condenses the moisture in the air into an impassable wall of ice to block all movement. The wall only lasts a short duration before it melts.
spells.dynamicDescription: Anivia summons an impassable wall of ice @WallWidth@ units wide, blocking all movement. The wall lasts for @WallDuration@ seconds before it melts.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Frostbite
spells.description: With a flap of her wings, Anivia blasts a freezing gust of wind at her target, dealing a medium amount of damage. If the target has been slowed by an ice effect, the damage they take is doubled.
spells.dynamicDescription: Anivia blasts her target with a freezing wind, dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage>.  If the target is chilled, they take <magicDamage>@EmpoweredDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Glacial Storm
spells.description: Anivia summons a driving rain of ice and hail to damage her enemies and slow their advance.
spells.dynamicDescription: <toggle>Toggle: </toggle>Anivia calls forth a driving rain of ice and hail, dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamagePerSecond@ magic damage</magicDamage> per second and chilling targets, <status>Slowing</status> their Attack and Movement Speed by @SlowAmount@%.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
